sub_modules.fft_sample_extend: Combinational sign extension from input sample width to FFT output width.
sub_modules.fft_twiddle_rom: Combinational 64-entry Q2.14 twiddle factor ROM for radix-2 FFT operations.
sub_modules.fft_complex_mult: Combinational fixed-point complex multiplier with twiddle fractional scaling.
sub_modules.fft_radix2_butterfly: Combinational radix-2 butterfly add/subtract block for complex samples.
sub_modules.fft_bit_reverse: Combinational address bit-reversal helper for 64-point FFT ordering.
